# Keyflo Learning KB — agent discovery index

> Canonical repo for querying the learning corpus (Pinecone + Neo4j) and the agentic router that picks which store to use.
> **Live:** https://github.com/James-Server-Admin/keyflo-learning-kb (public interim → `KeyFlo-ai/keyflo-learning-kb`)

## Start here

- [AGENTS.md](AGENTS.md): **Primary instructions for LLMs** — routing decision table, tools, env vars, when NOT to use this repo
- [README.md](README.md): Human-oriented overview for Cole and collaborators

## Routing (which database when)

- [docs/routing.md](docs/routing.md): vector vs graph vs both — decision table and examples
- [router/agentic_router.py](router/agentic_router.py): Agentic router source (`route_query()`)
- [docs/agentic-router.md](docs/agentic-router.md): How to run the router on the Keyflo server

## Store access

- [docs/pinecone.md](docs/pinecone.md): Pinecone index `learning` — namespaces, keys, `scripts/query_db.py`
- [docs/neo4j.md](docs/neo4j.md): Neo4j `learning-kg-neo4j` — bolt 7689, `scripts/query_graph.py`

## Scripts (read-only CLIs)

- `scripts/query_db.py`: Pinecone semantic search
- `scripts/query_graph.py`: Neo4j coverage / disputes / lane topics
- `scripts/route_query.py`: Agentic router launcher (server-only)

## Related (outside this repo)

- [okrealai/langchain-course](https://github.com/okrealai/langchain-course): Full router runtime + ingest + graph build
- [KeyFlo-ai/keyflo-marketing](https://github.com/KeyFlo-ai/keyflo-marketing): `kg_ground()` pipeline GraphRAG for ad copy/creative lanes
